title: Cell Culture Transfection and Immunoblotting
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4epm8","text":"This protocol describes the cultivation of rat dopaminergic N27 cells, transient transfection and immunoblotting","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

{"blocks":[{"key":"flkqe","text":"Cell Culture & Transfection","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f24ko","text":"N27 Cells: Rat dopaminergic
     cell line.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3te4t","text":"Culture Medium: DMEM (Gibco)
     supplemented with 10% FBS (Sigma-Aldrich) and 1%
     Penicillin-Streptomycin (Gibco).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15},{"style":"bold","offset":52,"length":7},{"style":"bold","offset":80,"length":31}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bm41t","text":"Transfection Reagent: FuGENE6
     (Promega, Cat# E2691).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"419n3","text":"Plasmid: pAAV DNA.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f7u6d","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"p7b2","text":"Lysis & Protein Assay","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"epkr","text":"Lysis Buffer: * 150mM NaCl","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2amf1","text":"50mM Tris pH 7.5","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"65dr5","text":"2mM EDTA","type":"unstyled","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ephkl","text":"Protease and phosphatase inhibitor cocktail (add fresh).","type":"unstyled","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"88are","text":"BCA Protein Assay Kit.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5tgad","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7954j","text":"Electrophoresis &
Immunoblotting","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":32}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"deura","text":"TBS-Tween (TBST): 150 mM NaCl, 50 mM Tris (pH 7.5), and 0.1% Tween-20.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"89kp1","text":"Blocking Buffer: 5% non-fat milk in TBST.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8pngb","text":"Membrane: PVDF.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"acspn","text":"Detection: Lumigen chemiluminescent reagents.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9kn3l","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ar6mn","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"djh4a","text":"CO2 Incubator: Set to 37degrees, 95% humidity, and 5% CO2 .","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5k007","text":"Imaging System: VersaDoc MP 4000  (Bio-Rad).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dhm73","text":"Software: Quantity One (Bio-Rad).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Maintain N27 cells in complete DMEM medium
Incubate at 37 °C in 5% CO2 and 95% humidified air
Seed cells to appropriate density prior to transfection.
Follow the specific manufacturer’s protocol (Promega) for reagent-to-DNA ratios.
Incubate cells for 48 hours post-transfection.
Perform transient DNA transfection of pAAV using FuGENE6 reagent.
Prepare samples by normalizing to an equal amount of protein (100ug per sample).
Quantify protein concentration using a BCA assay .
Centrifuge lysates to remove debris and collect the supernatant (whole cell lysate).
Lyse cells using the prepared Lysis Buffer (chilled).
Aspirate medium and wash cells with PBS.
Load 100ug of protein into each lane of an SDS-PAGE gel.
Transfer proteins from the gel to a PVDF membrane .
Run electrophoresis at desired voltage.
Block the membrane with 5% milk in TBST for 1 hour at room temperature.
Wash the membrane again with TBST.
Incubate with HRP-coupled secondary antibodies for 1 hour at room temperature .
Wash the membrane with TBST (typically 3 times for 10 minutes).
Incubate with primary antibodies in blocking buffer or TBST overnight at 4 degrees .
Apply Lumigen chemiluminescent reagents to the membrane according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
Analyze protein band density using Quantity One software.
Capture images using the VersaDoc MP 4000 system.
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
